{{Infobox character
| name = Professor Denon Javal
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Professor Denon Javal]] is half-[[Visiri]] and has a gift for making [[Subspace Drives]].}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
